explanation: Substitution: Replaced the suspicious path 'C:\Windows\Temp\' with a benign lab placeholder 'C:\Lab\input\' to avoid the Sigma rule's path-based detection.
Insertion: Added the '/f' flag to force task creation without changing the core behavior, which may bypass the rule if it focuses on command line length or specific argument order.
Reordering: Changed the argument order to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to the sequence of command-line parameters.
